title: Extending Kubernetes — Custom resource definitions
text:
Consider adding a
Custom Resource
to Kubernetes if you want to define new controllers, application
configuration objects or other declarative APIs, and to manage them using Kubernetes tools, such
as
kubectl
.
For more about Custom Resources, see the
Custom Resources
concept guide.

You can use Kubernetes'
API Aggregation Layer
to integrate the Kubernetes API with additional services such as for
metrics
.
